name: player routes
expected_query: with "tce66cf57ebb97797e5c8d3e5539ce862" as materialized (select "nfl_plays_receiver"."gsis_id", COUNT(*) as rate_type_total_count from "nfl_plays_receiver" inner join "nfl_plays" on "nfl_plays_receiver"."esbid" = "nfl_plays"."esbid" and "nfl_plays_receiver"."playId" = "nfl_plays"."playId" where "play_type" = 'PASS' and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024) and "nfl_plays_receiver"."year" in (2024) group by "nfl_plays_receiver"."gsis_id") select "player"."pid", tce66cf57ebb97797e5c8d3e5539ce862.rate_type_total_count as player_routes_0, "player"."pos" from "player" left join "tce66cf57ebb97797e5c8d3e5539ce862" on "tce66cf57ebb97797e5c8d3e5539ce862"."gsis_id" = "player"."gsisid" group by tce66cf57ebb97797e5c8d3e5539ce862.rate_type_total_count, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
